3101380.name: Base Blitz
3101380.description:
ABOUT BASE BLITZ

In Base Blitz, two teams battle it out in a high-stakes capture-the-flag competition. Set on resource-filled battlegrounds, each team must protect their base while devising strategies to infiltrate the enemy's. Your flag is perched on the roof of your base just out of enemy reach, but so is theirs. The only way in? Tear down their walls by gathering resources, crafting items such as pickaxes, bombs and cannons, and launch a full-scale blitz!

CRAFT AND DESTROY

The battlegrounds are rich with natural resources - trees, stones, sticks, and more - all waiting to be harvested. Use your crafting table to forge weapons, tools, and explosives to break through enemy defenses or strengthen your own. Use your metal ore to craft cannonballs and unleash devastating firepower on your opponents, or put it towards defense items such as bear traps and landmines to keep your rivals out of your base!

The Meteor Strike

When the sky turns red and the ground trembles beneath your feet, it can only mean one thing - a meteor is about to strike! Every so often a meteor will crash into the battlegrounds creating chaos and opportunity. Harvest its nitrate to craft the most devastating items such as the boom ball or the air cannon. But beware, both teams will race to claim this valuable resource, so it won't come easy!

Strategize And Conquer

Teamwork is key. Use a catapult to launch teammates onto enemy roofs, build barricades to defend critical points, or sneak over enemy defenses with wall spikes. Engage in intense player vs player combat with a variety of craftable weapons like swords, spears, axes, bows, and cannons. Will your team rely on brute force, sneaky tactics, or clever teamwork to capture the flag and claim victory?

Blitz Or Be Blitzed

No base is safe, and no strategy is foolproof. Adapt to the chaos, outsmart your opponents, and dominate the battlefield. Gather your team, plan your attack, and blitz your way to victory!
